arts.ttl: Barcelona star admits ‘without Xavi, I wouldn’t have worn this shirt’
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has this weekend moved to confirm his appreciation for former head coach Xavi Hernández. The player in question? Raphinha.…

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s squad players are making a push to become starters
arts.sum: Ferran Torres hit a hat-trick against Valencia in the Copa del Rey, and Fermín López added another, as Frenkie de Jong and Eric Garcia pulled the strings from deep. Some of FC Barcelona ’s squad players are contributing more than ever, as they fight for more minutes and even potentially a starting place.

arts.ttl: Sidelined Barcelona star could return for final games of the season
arts.sum: An altogether encouraging update on the wellbeing of Barcelona star Marc-André ter Stegen has this weekend come to the fore online. Goalkeeper Ter Stegen has for his part of course…

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford BOMBSHELL: January transfer blocked by Barcelona trio
arts.sum: The 27-year-old was a key target for Hansi Flick’s side during the winter transfer window, as exclusively reported by FootballTransfers, but the Blaugrana were unable to finalise an agreement with Manchester United and Rashford joined Aston Villa on loan instead . Marcus Rashford’s proposed January move to Barcelona was blocked by Pedri, Gavi and Ronald Araujo, according to sensational reports in Spain.

arts.ttl: Ansu Fati struggling to even make the bench as he ponders his future

arts.ttl: Man United 'approached Barcelona in January' with Red Devils prepared to make 'substantial offer' for Fermin Lopez
arts.sum: Manchester United were allegedly willing to pay £58m to sign Barcelona midfielder Fermin Lopez during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Sevilla vs Barcelona Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Barcelona will look to close the gap to league leaders Real Madrid when they take on Sevilla in La Liga tonight. Ahead of the clash, we’ve made a prediction for the game, provided our predicted...

A win could see Sevilla climb into the top half of the table, but games don't come much tougher than facing Barcelona, who have picked up 24 points on the road this season, more than any other side. ...
